title: Split put out of SecretStore into WriteableSecretStore subtrait
description: SecretStore.put is in the mandatory base trait but env and bitwarden cannot support it and return inconsistent error variants (Unavailable vs Backend) as stubs. This violates the trait contract: callers holding Arc<dyn SecretStore> can call put and only discover the failure at runtime. The fix is to move put into a WriteableSecretStore: SecretStore subtrait, so the 9 writable backends implement both traits and the 2 read-only backends implement only SecretStore. A parallel from_uri_writable constructor returns Arc<dyn WriteableSecretStore> and fails at construction time for non-writable backends. CachingStore gets a conditional impl<S: WriteableSecretStore> WriteableSecretStore for CachingStore<S>. This is a breaking API change requiring a 0.3.x semver bump.
